patient_ref: Sarah Mitchell (fork of hero case, later timepoint)
line_of_therapy: Considering capecitabine re-challenge; incidental new anticoagulation

planted_gaps.description: Patient started on warfarin for an incidental DVT; capecitabine is now being considered. INT-002 (capecitabine + warfarin) requires a current renal panel, but the most recent creatinine on file is over four months old.
planted_gaps.catching_check: flag_stale_data must fire before check_drug_interactions can be trusted (sequencing dependency)

notes: Fork of hero case. The stale-renal-panel + new-warfarin combination is the only intended finding; it requires chaining two checks, not either alone.
